title: Sales and Marketing Manager (Education)
description:
Stag Match® Institute (SMI) is a registered education business that has become a leading education business in the education industry. Our growing services are in-line with Singapore’ Education system, which focuses on students’ creative thinking and analytical skills.

Stag Match (SMI) is looking for a High-performing and track record Sales and Marketing Manager (Education ).His/Her responsibilities include meeting the Sales KPI, developing key growth sales strategies, tactics and action plans.


Responsibilities

Own and hit/exceed monthly company sales targets

Determine annual unit and gross-profit plans by implementing marketing strategies; analyzing trends and results

Develop and execute strategic plan to achieve sales targets and expand customer base (Locally and Oversea)

Present products to clients


Job description

Achieves and Manage Sales target.

Plan and execute Sales and marketing initiatives .

Promote, create and achieves Sales and Marketing objectives by contributing to Sales and Marketing efforts and providing recommendations to strategic plans and review effectively.

Preparing and completing action plans; Aims to service product quality; High level of customer-service standards; Resolving problems; Identifying trends.

Formulation of strategies to build a lasting Sales and digital media connection with consumers.

Coordinate with campaigns and ensure outstanding delivery.

Responsible for leads generating application, monitor the lead pipeline and provide weekly report to the Director, Sales/Business Development.

To work with Director and Deputy Director on marketing budget and develop cost- effective sales and marketing plan.

To support the BU in all other activities as and when assigned.

media agency and creative team in the production of all media (digital and print), marketing

Perform Road Show.

Tel Sales and Tel-calling .

By forecasting requirements; Sales Reporting; Preparing annual budget; Scheduling expenditures.

Analyzing variances; Initiating corrective actions.

Attend corporate meetings and exhibitions when required.


Requirements

The candidate MUST have a sense of experience in sales and Digital Marketing

Excellent listening, negotiation and presentation skills

Proven sales executive experience, meeting or exceeding targets

Previous experience as a sales executive, sales manager or sales and marketing director

Ability to communicate, present and influence all levels of the organization, including executive and C-level

Proven ability to drive the sales process from plan to close

Proven ability to articulate the distinct aspects of products and services

Proven ability to position products against competitors

Ability to understand the impact of operational initiatives from a sales or marketing person's perspective

Demonstrable experience as head of sales, developing client-focused, differentiated and achievable solutions

Ability to prepare reports and use of appropriate mode of communication. Must be proficient at analyzing data, building reporting and making strategic recommendations based on data and trends

Ability to manage multiple projects and work to tight deadlines

Proven success working in a fast-paced, high-growth environment

Keen business sense, with the ability to find creative business-oriented solutions to problems

postedCompany.description:
Incorporated in 2015, Stag Match Institute (SMI) a member of SMET Group. Offering a comprehensive range of Courses (WSQ & Non-WSQ) to working professionals (individuals or companies), Our courses were designed & crafted by our experienced certified trainers that aims to impart the most updated industry-relevant knowledge to our trainees.

Leveraging on SMET Group‘s successful formula in the education industry (Stag Match Education and Training Group since 2001), Stag Match Institute is poised to expand in the adult learning segment with the group’s support with its extensive resources, excellent & proven track records in the education industry in Singapore.

Stag Match Pte Ltd is a WSQ Training Provider approved by SkillsFuture Singapore (SSG).
postedCompany.name: STAG MATCH INSTITUTE PRIVATE LIMITED
